email.orderStatus.creditReturned.en: The {amount} you paid with {label} has been returned to your wallet.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.fr: Le montant de {amount} payé avec {label} a été recrédité sur votre cagnotte.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.es: El importe de {amount} que pagaste con {label} se ha devuelto a tu monedero.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.it: L'importo di {amount} pagato con {label} è stato riaccreditato nel tuo portafoglio.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.pt: O valor de {amount} que pagou com {label} foi devolvido à sua carteira.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.pt-BR: O valor de {amount} que você pagou com {label} foi devolvido à sua carteira.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.ca: L'import de {amount} que vas pagar amb {label} s'ha retornat al teu moneder.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.ro: Suma de {amount} plătită cu {label} a fost returnată în portofelul tău.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.de: Der mit {label} gezahlte Betrag von {amount} wurde Ihrem Guthaben wieder gutgeschrieben.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.nl: Het bedrag van {amount} dat je met {label} betaalde, is teruggestort in je tegoed.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.bg: Сумата от {amount}, платена с {label}, беше върната в портфейла ви.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.hr: Iznos od {amount} plaćen s {label} vraćen je u vaš novčanik.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.sr: Iznos od {amount} plaćen sa {label} vraćen je u vaš novčanik.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.sl: Znesek {amount}, plačan z {label}, je bil vrnjen v vašo denarnico.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.et: Summa {amount}, mille tasusite {label} abil, on tagastatud teie rahakotti.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.lv: Summa {amount}, ko samaksājāt ar {label}, ir atgriezta jūsu makā.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.lt: {amount} suma, sumokėta naudojant {label}, grąžinta į jūsų piniginę.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.tr: {label} ile ödediğiniz {amount} tutarı cüzdanınıza iade edildi.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.sv: Beloppet {amount} som du betalade med {label} har återförts till din plånbok.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.ru: Сумма {amount}, оплаченная с помощью {label}, возвращена в ваш кошелёк.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.da: Beløbet {amount}, som du betalte med {label}, er ført tilbage til din saldo.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.nb: Beløpet {amount} som du betalte med {label}, er tilbakeført til lommeboken din.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.fi: Summa {amount}, jonka maksoit {label}-saldolla, on palautettu lompakkoosi.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.pl: Kwota {amount} zapłacona za pomocą {label} została zwrócona do Twojego portfela.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.cs: Částka {amount} zaplacená pomocí {label} byla vrácena do vaší peněženky.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.sk: Suma {amount} zaplatená pomocou {label} bola vrátená do vašej peňaženky.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.hu: A {label} egyenlegből fizetett {amount} összeg visszakerült a tárcájába.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.el: Το ποσό {amount} που πληρώσατε με {label} επιστράφηκε στο πορτοφόλι σας.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.uk: Суму {amount}, сплачену за допомогою {label}, повернено до вашого гаманця.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.id: Jumlah {amount} yang Anda bayar dengan {label} telah dikembalikan ke dompet Anda.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.vi: Số tiền {amount} bạn đã thanh toán bằng {label} đã được hoàn lại vào ví của bạn.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.th: ยอด {amount} ที่คุณชำระด้วย {label} ถูกคืนเข้ากระเป๋าเงินของคุณแล้ว
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.zh: 您使用{label}支付的 {amount} 已退回您的钱包。
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.ja: {label}でお支払いいただいた{amount}は、ウォレットに返金されました。
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.ar: تمت إعادة مبلغ {amount} الذي دفعته باستخدام {label} إلى محفظتك.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.he: הסכום {amount} ששילמתם באמצעות {label} הוחזר לארנק שלכם.
email.orderStatus.creditReturned.hi: {label} से भुगतान की गई {amount} राशि आपके वॉलेट में वापस कर दी गई है।
